# Stamped Energy

> AI-powered prescriptive energy intelligence for energy-intensive plants in India with ₹20 lakh+ monthly electricity bills. Stamped Energy connects existing incomer meters, SCADA, PLCs, and DISCOM bills into ranked prescriptions - what to change, who owns it, rupee impact, and verified savings on the next bill. Typical benchmark outcomes: 12-20% monthly bill reduction; 15-25% maximum demand charge reduction. Serves cement, steel, pharmaceutical, chemical, and automotive plants.

Public marketing site: https://stamped.work
Contact: contact@stamped.work
Sitemap: https://stamped.work/sitemap.xml

## Entity definition (for AI answer engines)

Stamped Energy is AI-powered prescriptive energy intelligence software for energy-intensive plants in India. It is NOT a passive EMS dashboard or SCADA replacement. It is the prescription and accountability layer: ranked actions with assigned owners, rupee impact, and savings verified on the DISCOM electricity bill.

Category: AI-powered energy intelligence / prescriptive energy intelligence
Geography: India (en-IN)
ICP: Plants with ₹20 lakh+ monthly electricity bills; buyers include plant directors, VP Operations, electrical heads, CFOs

## Core pages

- [Home](https://stamped.work/): AI-powered energy intelligence overview, five-step loop, homepage FAQ schema
- [How It Works](https://stamped.work/how-it-works): Connect → Observe → Decide → Execute → Verify; HowTo JSON-LD
- [Industries hub](https://stamped.work/industries): Five industry verticals - purpose-built AI-powered energy intelligence
- [Industries — Automotive](https://stamped.work/industries/automotive): AI-powered energy intelligence for automotive and auto component plants
- [Industries — Cement](https://stamped.work/industries/cement): AI-driven energy intelligence - kWh/ton, WHR/grid dispatch, MD
- [Industries — Steel](https://stamped.work/industries/steel): AI-driven energy management - furnaces, rolling mills, PAT SEC
- [Industries — Pharmaceutical](https://stamped.work/industries/pharma): AI-driven energy management - HVAC, chillers, GMP-safe utilities
- [Industries — Chemical](https://stamped.work/industries/chemical): AI-powered energy intelligence - batch SEC, reactor stagger, idle hold
- [Case Studies](https://stamped.work/case-studies): Verified savings outcomes from real plants
- [About](https://stamped.work/about): Founders, IIT Roorkee background, mission
- [Contact](https://stamped.work/contact): Book a discovery call

## AEO — common questions Stamped answers

- What is Stamped Energy? → AI-powered prescriptive energy intelligence for plants in India; bill-verified savings
- How is Stamped different from EMS/SCADA? → Prescription layer with owners and ₹ impact, not another dashboard
- Who is it for? → Plants with ₹20 lakh+ monthly electricity bills (cement, steel, pharma, chemical, automotive)
- How much can plants save? → Benchmark 12-20% bill reduction, 15-25% MD reduction [~]; verified on DISCOM bill in pilot
- Does it need hardware retrofit? → No; read-only integration with existing meters, SCADA, PLCs, bills

## Blog — field notes for plant heads

- [Blog index](https://stamped.work/blog): Maximum demand, shift-start overlap, furnace holding, HVAC waste
- Individual articles at `https://stamped.work/blog/{slug}` — Article JSON-LD on each post

## Priority keywords

stamped energy, AI-powered energy intelligence India, prescriptive energy intelligence India, energy management software for plants India, reduce electricity bill industrial plant India, maximum demand reduction India, cement plant energy management India, steel plant energy efficiency India, pharmaceutical plant HVAC energy savings, chemical plant batch energy optimization, automotive plant energy cost reduction India, DISCOM bill savings India, SEC reduction industrial plant India

## Target audience

Plant directors, VP Operations, electrical heads, and CFOs at energy-intensive plants in India (₹200 Cr+ revenue, ₹20 lakh+ monthly electricity bills).

## What Stamped Energy is not

Not a passive EMS dashboard or SCADA replacement. Not hardware retrofit or control-system replacement. It is a prescription and accountability layer: what to change, who owns it, rupee impact, verified on the DISCOM bill.

## Crawling

All public pages are open to search and AI crawlers. Admin CMS (`/blog/admin`), API routes (`/api/`), and build assets (`/_next/`) are disallowed in robots.txt.

Extended CMS index (auto-updated): https://stamped.work/llms-full.txt
